_status: v5 — uses existing assets only, no Nano Banana
_supersedes: C:/emerald/pipeline/set_list_M1.json (legacy v0 layout) and scene_M1.json v4 background block (CSS gradient — Nirit-rejected)
_nirit_v4_rejection_addressed: 'היא רצה עם רקע בלי כלום, זה לא שמיים, זה לא מטוס, זה סתם רקע כחול וזהוב' — FIXED: Phase 1 now uses bg_airplane.mp4 (real photoreal aerial sky+clouds+canopy, NOT a gradient).
'למה ננו בננה, כבר יש כל כך הרבה רקעים של השמיים' — FIXED: zero new generation. Both phases use existing bg files Nirit's project already owns.

phase_1_pre_jump._visual_read: Player is in the open sky with jungle landing zone far below; rival competitors already drifting through the air ahead of her.
phase_1_pre_jump.bg_note: Despite the filename, this video is an aerial shot of jungle canopy from high altitude with open blue sky and wispy clouds filling the upper 60% of frame. Verified via ffmpeg keyframe extract @ 1.5s. NO plane interior, NO ramp, NO door — exactly the 'I'm about to jump' POV without any of the cargo-bay imagery Nirit killed in v3.

scenery_overlays.css: top:6%; left:5%; width:90%; opacity:0.78; z-index:3; filter:blur(0.4px)

animation.name: rivalsDriftA
animation.keyframes: 0% { transform: translateX(0); } 50% { transform: translateX(2vw); } 100% { transform: translateX(0); }

scenery_overlays.rationale: Visualizes mission_text 'המתחרים כבר באוויר וצוברים יתרון מטורף' literally. Six chroma-keyed rival silhouettes (paragliders, hang glider, wingsuits) drifting in the upper-third of the sky. REPLACES v4's CSS-dot rivals with real figures Nirit's team already produced. Slow drift = felt-not-counted presence.

phase_1_pre_jump.rationale: Combines real photoreal sky+clouds+altitude (bg_airplane.mp4) with literal-illustration rivals (competitors_in_air.png) — directly answers Nirit's two complaints. No Nano Banana, no new generation. Both files verified on disk.

phase_2_landing._visual_read: Player has just landed in a dense jungle clearing — wet ground, palms, distant misty trees. Matches checkpoint_text 'הג'ונגל סמיך משחשבתי, חייבים לזוז'.
phase_2_landing.bg_note: Ground-level dense jungle: wet stones and puddles in the foreground, palms and dense foliage flanking, misty distant trees, narrow strip of pale sky through the canopy. PERFECT match for pose_03 crouch landing (hands-on-ground). Verified via ffmpeg keyframe extract @ 1.5s. Replaces v4's bg_M5.mp4 — bg_M5 is canopy-from-above (between leaves), wrong perspective for a character whose hands are touching the ground.

scenery_overlays.rationale: Foreground framing trees — anchors the 'jungle is denser than I thought' read of the checkpoint text by adding closer foliage in front of the bg video. Slight parallax optional.

scenery_overlays.css: bottom:8%; right:30%; width:18%; opacity:0; z-index:6; pointer-events:none
scenery_overlays.opacity_keyframes: 0% { opacity:0; transform: scale(0.7); } 30% { opacity:0.6; transform: scale(1.0); } 100% { opacity:0; transform: scale(1.2); }
scenery_overlays.rationale: Landing impact dust puff at the player's feet at touchdown (= pose_03 frame 5.0 = hands-on-ground). One-shot, brief, sells the landing weight. Position aligned with player CSS bottom:5% right:30% from scene_M1 phase_4_landing.

phase_2_landing.rationale: Ground-POV jungle floor matches the pose semantics (crouch, hands-on-ground) and the checkpoint text ('jungle denser than I thought'). Foreground trees add depth. Dust puff anchors the impact moment. All files verified on disk.

phase_1_to_2._note: Tightened from scene_M1.json's 500ms to 400ms — the player CSS jump itself is 600ms, and we want bg to settle before pose_03 crouch begins (jump_apex + 0ms). 400ms gives a snappy bg-cut feel without jarring.

builder_notes.chroma_keying: All scenery PNGs in this set_list (competitors_in_air, two_jungle_trees, dust_clouds) are on green chroma #00B140 per project convention. Builder must run them through the same chroma-keyer pipeline used for poses/tools. Do NOT composite them as raw PNGs — the green will show.
builder_notes.z_order: z=0 bg_video; z=3 competitors (Phase 1); z=4 two_jungle_trees (Phase 2); z=5 player canvas (per scene_M1.json); z=6 dust_clouds (Phase 2 transient).
builder_notes.phase_swap_mechanics: Two stacked <video> elements. Phase 1 plays from t=0. At jump_apex event, Phase 2 video starts (currentTime=0) and crossfades over 400ms via opacity. Phase 1 element pauses + display:none after fade.
builder_notes.no_player_layer_changes: set_list does NOT modify player composition. scene_M1.json v4 player block (pose_04 -> pose_06 -> pose_03 with click-gated catch) remains authoritative.

supersedes_in_scene_M1.background.phase_1: REPLACE css_gradient_with_motion block with phase_1_pre_jump.bg_video reference here.
supersedes_in_scene_M1.rivals[]: REPLACE 5 CSS-dot rival specs with phase_1_pre_jump.scenery_overlays[0] (competitors_in_air.png chroma-keyed overlay).
supersedes_in_scene_M1.scenery: REPLACE the empty scenery=[{file:null}] with the per-phase overlays defined here.
supersedes_in_scene_M1._note_to_director: scene_M1.json should be updated downstream by director or composition_root pulling this set_list. set_manager does NOT modify scene_M1.json directly per task constraints.

_human_review_note: FOR REVIEWER: (1) bg_airplane.mp4 — please open the file and confirm it reads as 'altitude POV just before jump' (filename is misleading; content is aerial sky+canopy). Path: C:/emerald/backgrounds/bg_airplane.mp4. (2) competitors_in_air.png contains SIX rival figures vs scene_M1.json rivals.count = 5 — accepted as 'felt-not-counted'. (3) bg_jungle_clearing.mp4 chosen over bg_M5.mp4 for Phase 2 because crouch landing needs ground perspective. Reviewer may swap if preferred — both files exist. (4) NO Nano Banana / Veo / Leonardo invoked anywhere in this set_list. Every path is a file already on disk as of 2026-04-25.
